note: Curated, hash-pinned GGUF models. A pool may only load a model whose (model_id, sha256) appears here. This is the primary defense against poisoned-model attacks: a peer cannot be instructed to download arbitrary weights, and a peer that downloads a file whose sha256 doesn't match refuses to serve it (see node/inference.py).

models.note: Default lightweight model. sha256 to be pinned on first verified download.
sha256 pinned on first verified download.
